title: allium schmitzii
intro: Allium schmitzii, also known as the Schmitz's onion, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It is a perennial bulbous plant native to the southwestern United States, particularly in the states of New Mexico and Texas. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, such as flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Allium schmitzii, such as infusions and tinctures, are used to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and to boost the immune system.
